help.title: Commands
help.description: Please specify the category for which you need help
help.footer: Use the dropdown menu for more information.

giveaway.title: 🎉 Giveaway
giveaway.invalidDuration: Invalid duration. Use a valid format (e.g., 1h, 30m, 2s).

errors.noPermissions: I don't have the necessary permissions to perform this/these action(s).
errors.invalidChannel: Are you trying to create a channel in another channel?
errors.default: An error occurred while executing the command: {error}

announcement.title: 📢 Announcement
announcement.description: **Attention, all test subjects!** We have a super important announcement to make!
announcement.prompt: Write an announcement about: {topic}. It must be formatted in markdown, like a discord announcement. Also add emojis if you wish. You must write the announcement in English as if you were in public, and not to a specific person.

welcome.title: 📢 Welcome Channel Configuration
welcome.description: Please select the welcome channel to use.
welcome.channels_detected: Welcome and leave channels automatically detected :

removewelcome.no_system_description: No welcome system is configured on this server.
removewelcome.confirmation_description: The following channels are configured for the welcome system:
removewelcome.confirmation_warning: ⚠️ This action will permanently remove the welcome system configuration from all these channels.
